MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Feb-13-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Paul Lukacs, Esq. of HATTIS LAW, T:916.292.9739, for plaintiff/moving party, on Court Call;
Joseph Duffy, Esq. of MORGAN LEWIS & BOCKIUS, T:213.612.7378, for defendant, on Court Call.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopted its tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF JAMES ANDREWS' MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE as follows:

The verified application of Shane T. Price to appear as counsel pro hac vice to plaintiff and the proposed class is granted. No opposition filed, and the application conforms to Cal. R. Ct. 9.40.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com

MINI MINUTES:

Paul Lukacs, Esq. of HATTIS LAW, T:916.292.9739, for plaintiff/moving party, on Court Call;
Joseph Duffy, Esq. of MORGAN LEWIS & BOCKIUS, T:213.612.7378, for defendant, on Court Call.
